mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_model(tenant_id, model_code, display_name, description, supports_streaming, supports_tool_calling, supports_vision, supports_cache, publish_status, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{tenantId}, #{modelCode}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{supportsStreaming}, #{supportsToolCalling}, #{supportsVision}, #{supportsCache}, #{publishStatus}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, model_code, display_name, description, supports_streaming, supports_tool_calling, supports_vision, supports_cache, publish_status, enabled, deleted_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tenant_model WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.sql: m.id, m.tenant_id, t.name AS tenant_name, m.model_code, m.display_name, m.description, m.supports_streaming, m.supports_tool_calling, m.supports_vision, m.supports_cache, CASE WHEN m.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'DELETED' WHEN m.publish_status = 'ENABLED' THEN 'ENABLED' WHEN m.publish_status = 'DISABLED' THEN 'DISABLED' ELSE 'DRAFT' END AS status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping x WHERE x.tenant_model_id = m.id AND x.deleted_at IS NULL) AS mapping_count, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tenant_model_price p WHERE p.tenant_model_id = m.id AND p.expired_at IS NULL) AS has_active_price, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM model_route r WHERE r.tenant_model_id = m.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL) AS route_count, m.created_at, m.updated_at
FROM tenant_model m LEFT JOIN tenant t ON t.id = m.tenant_id
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE publish_status = 'ENABLED') AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE publish_status = 'DISABLED') AS disabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE publish_status = 'DRAFT') AS draft, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tenant_model_price p WHERE p.tenant_model_id = m.id AND p.expired_at IS NULL)) AS missing_price, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM model_route r WHERE r.tenant_model_id = m.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL)) AS missing_route FROM tenant_model m WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL AND (#{platform} = TRUE OR m.tenant_id = #{tenantId}) AND m.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_model SET model_code = #{modelCode}, display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, supports_streaming = #{supportsStreaming}, supports_tool_calling = #{supportsToolCalling}, supports_vision = #{supportsVision}, supports_cache = #{supportsCache}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant_model SET publish_status = #{publishStatus}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant_model SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

WITH deleted_model AS ( UPDATE tenant_model SET deleted_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id ), deleted_routes AS ( UPDATE model_route SET deleted_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_model_id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id ) UPDATE route_target SET deleted_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE model_route_id IN (SELECT id FROM model_route WHERE tenant_model_id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL) AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant_model_candidate_mapping SET deleted_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_model_id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
